title: Looking for Category Manager at ixigo

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at ixigo
jsonLd.description:
Join the ixigo family as a Category Manager in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ixigo:
ixigo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ixigo!
